description_long: This structure is a medium-sized, concrete half-pipe dam with a weathered, brownish surface and visible signs of wear and graffiti. The dam features a curved, bowl-like central section flanked by two vertical retaining walls, each topped with metal safety railings. The interior of the dam is decorated with large, colorful painted symbols, including a blue atomic motif and a red arrow-like design. The exterior surfaces are rough and stained, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements. There are no visible water control mechanisms, spillways, or gates, and the dam appears to be dry with no water present. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on structural integrity and safety, as indicated by the perimeter railings.
description: A weathered, concrete half-pipe dam with metal railings and colorful graffiti on its interior surfaces. The structure is robust, utilitarian, and shows signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical retaining wall with a blue atomic symbol and metal railings on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full curved bowl of the dam, both graffiti designs, and the continuous perimeter railings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the opposite retaining wall with a red arrow symbol and matching railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the interior curve, both graffiti symbols, and the symmetry of the structure.
